queries.question: From what culture and associated geographical area did all the dances originate?
queries.sql: SELECT name, region FROM Culture JOIN Dance ON Dance.culture_id = Culture.id JOIN Geographical_Area ON Dance.Geographical_Area_id = Geographical_Area.id  GROUP BY culture_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?region WHERE {
  ?culture a :Culture .
  ?dance a :Dance .
  ?dance p:hasCulture ?culture .
  ?geographical_area a :Geographical_Area .
  ?dance p:hasGeographical_Area ?geographical_area .
  ?dance p:culture_id ?culture_id_g .
  ?culture p:name ?name .
  ?geographical_area p:region ?region .
}
GROUP BY ?culture_id_g ?name ?region

queries.question: From what culture did capoeira originate?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Culture JOIN Dance ON Dance.culture_id = Culture.id  WHERE dance_name = 'Capoeira'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?culture a :Culture .
  ?dance a :Dance .
  ?dance p:hasCulture ?culture .
  ?culture p:name ?name .
  ?dance p:dance_name ?dance_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?dance_name_f) = "Capoeira")
}

queries.question: In what geographical area did capoeira originate?
queries.sql: SELECT region FROM Geographical_Area JOIN Dance ON Dance.Geographical_Area_id = Geographical_Area.id  WHERE dance_name = 'Capoeira'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?region WHERE {
  ?geographical_area a :Geographical_Area .
  ?dance a :Dance .
  ?dance p:hasGeographical_Area ?geographical_area .
  ?geographical_area p:region ?region .
  ?dance p:dance_name ?dance_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?dance_name_f) = "Capoeira")
}
